note: Browser tool was unavailable (Chrome extension relay not connected). Screenshots could not be captured. Observations based on HTML source analysis and web_fetch.

homepage.title: Marketing Agency - Strategy - Digital - Creative - LaneTerralever
observations: Hero section uses background image (hero-banner.jpg) with headline overlay
Header contains top info-bar with newsletter signup
Navigation: Industries (dropdown) | Work | Services | Insights (dropdown) | About LT (dropdown) | Contact
Social media icons: LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, X (Twitter)
Hero headline: 'We create meaningful customer experiences based on deep strategic insights.'
Below fold: Who We Are section, Industries grid, Services section, Case Studies, Client Partners, Instagram feed, C&C banner
Footer appears comprehensive with multiple columns
accessibility_observations: Skip to main content link present (good)
Navigation has ARIA labels and roles (role='navigation', role='menu', aria-haspopup, aria-expanded)
Images: Logo has alt='lt-logo-3' (descriptive but technical)
Font Awesome icons used for social media (may need aria-labels)
Image loading attribute missing on hero image (performance concern)

services.title: Services | LaneTerralever
observations: Services page appears thin — readability extractor only returned ~622 raw bytes of content
Main visible copy: 'This Is How We Do It' heading
Describes 'Craftmanship and speed with purpose' as core values
Mentions three key steps to business outcomes (not enumerated in extracted text)

contact.title: Full-Service Marketing Company - Contact LaneTerralever
observations: Multi-step contact form with radio buttons for intent
Options: 'Becoming a Client', 'Working at LT', 'Something Else'
'Working at LT' shows career page link instead of form
Phoenix office address: 645 E. Missouri Ave, Suite 400, Phoenix, AZ 85012
